event: operated for treatment of right inguinal hernia 20 years ago
ECBU revealed a leucocyturia 320,000 and hematuria at 120,000
received antibiotic therapy based on ceftriaxone plus metronidazole
urinary tract infection due to Pseudomonas Aeruginosa
rise of a right double J stent
decrease of the infectious syndrome with apyrexia on the second postoperative day
chronic renal failure persisting despite a resumption of normal diuresis
abdominopelvic CT showed a clear regression of the bubbles of air
double J catheter was removed within six weeks
